title: OrderCancelledV1
description: Emitted when a previously placed order is cancelled.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being cancelled.

distributorId.description: Distributor that was servicing this order.

outletId.description: Retail outlet that placed the order.

cancelledBy.description: User ID of the actor who cancelled the order.

reasonDetail.description: Free-text additional detail for the cancellation reason.

refundAmount.description: Amount to be refunded or credited back.

cancelledAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the cancellation occurred.
